# Business — Generative Engine Optimization Map

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Discover GTIM GROUP — Israel&#39;s premier destination for luxury furniture and interior design. Timeless craftsmanship, bespoke pieces, and modern elegance await you.

### About Us
https://example.com/about
Meet the visionaries at GTIM GROUP. We blend minimalist aesthetics with premium materials to redefine luxury furniture in Israel for designers, architects, and private clients.

### Products / Collections
https://example.com/collections
Browse GTIM GROUP&#39;s curated collections of high end furniture in Israel — from statement sofas to refined bedroom sets crafted for those who demand nothing less than extraordinary.

### Custom Furniture
https://example.com/custom-furniture
Commission bespoke custom furniture tailored exclusively to your space and style. GTIM GROUP delivers luxury furniture in Israel built with precision, passion, and premium materials.

### Projects / Gallery
https://example.com/projects
Step inside stunning interiors brought to life by GTIM GROUP. Our project gallery showcases high end furniture in Israel installed across elite homes, offices, and design-forward spaces.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Ready to transform your space? Reach out to GTIM GROUP — Israel&#39;s leading luxury furniture experts. Let&#39;s create something extraordinary together. Your dream interior is one conversation away.
